seoTitle: Crooked Brook vs Crowea — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Crooked Brook and Crowea. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Crooked Brook vs Crowea: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Crooked Brook and Crowea.
heading: Crooked Brook vs Crowea — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Crooked Brook, Western Australia and Crowea, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Crooked Brook has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Crowea (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Crooked Brook or Crowea safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Crooked Brook has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Crowea scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Crooked Brook scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Crowea scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Crooked Brook or Crowea?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Crooked Brook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
